MOTION TO INTERVENE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE, AS AN INSURER OF DEFENDANT PONTES, LLC.'s MOTION TO INTERVENE.

Farmers Insurance Exchange's unopposed Motion to Intervene on Behalf of Defendant Pontes, LLC is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court grants Farmer Insurance Exchange leave to intervene as a defendant in this action on Behalf of Defendant Pontes, LLC. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 387(d)(1)(B).) Farmer Insurance Exchange shall file its answer in intervention forthwith, but no later than 20 days after entry of this order. Farmer Insurance Exchange should present this order at the time it submits its answer in intervention for filing.

FIE must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org no later than 8:30 am on 8/8/2025 a proposed order quoting the above text verbatim.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Intervene On Behalf Of Defendants Silas Bezerra And Luiz Paixao
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Intervene On Behalf Of Defendants Silas Bezerra And Luiz Paixao.

Farmers Insurance Exchange's unopposed Motion to Intervene is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court grants Farmer Insurance Exchange leave to intervene as a defendant in this action. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 387(d)(1)(B).) Farmer Insurance Exchange shall file its answer in intervention forthwith, but no later than 20 days after entry of this order. Farmer Insurance Exchange should present this order at the time it submits its answer in intervention for filing.

FIE must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org no later than 8:30 am on 7/15/2025 a proposed order quoting the above text verbatim. (No proposed order was received at 8:30am via email)

Counsel for FIE is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
